task: Can you play the recap from the most recent NBA game?
graderReasoning: The agent navigated to ESPN, opened the NBA scoreboard, selected the previous date (May 12, 2026) to find the most recent completed NBA game, identified Timberwolves vs. Spurs as the latest finished game, and clicked the Highlights link. This opened the ESPN video highlights page at https://www.espn.com/nba/video/_/gameId/401871156 with title 'Spurs 126-97 Timberwolves (May 12, 2026) Video Highlights - ESPN'. The page clearly showed the game highlights/recap content for that game. Although direct DOM evidence of pressing a play button is limited due video/ad rendering issues and CDP disconnects, the agent reached the correct recap video page and had visual evidence from annotated screenshots that the video was playing. Under the task intent ('play the recap'), reaching the correct video page with the recap active is sufficient.
final_result_response: It’s playing now: the ESPN recap/highlights for the most recent completed NBA game, Timberwolves at Spurs, Spurs won 126-97.
action_history: Opening ESPN: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.espn.com/');
Selecting previous NBA date: await page.locator('e60').click();
Starting the game highlights video: await page.getByText('Minnesota Timberwolves vs. San Antonio Spurs: Game Highlights').last().click();
Starting the game highlights video: await page.locator('text="Minnesota Timberwolves vs. San Antonio Spurs: Game Highlights"').last().click();
Reopening the highlights page: const p2 = await openTab('https://www.espn.com/nba/video/_/gameId/401871156');
Reopening and clicking the recap video: const p3 = await openTab('https://www.espn.com/nba/video/_/gameId/401871156');
Reopening and clicking the recap video: await page.locator('video').click();
